case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. BRIAN JONES et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-13-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-13-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-13-2010 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, BRIAN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-25-2009
